customManagers.description: Update Makefile tool versions via inline renovate comments
Update .mise.toml tool pins via inline renovate comments
Track Testcontainers MongoDBContainer image versions in ANY Java file (glob is intentionally broad — renaming a test file should not silently drop Renovate tracking)
Track mongo image version in docs/reference-architecture.md fenced YAML examples (kept in sync with k8s/mongodb-deployment.yaml)

packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before automerging major updates
Regex-managed docker refs (Makefile PlantUML/mermaid-cli, docs mongo, Testcontainers) don't capture currentDigest — skip digest pinning to avoid Renovate 'update failure' on pin-dependencies branch
Group GitHub Actions into one PR

Group Spring Boot + Spring Framework + Spring Cloud into ONE PR. These release trains are version-locked: Spring Cloud enforces a runtime CompatibilityVerifier against the Spring Boot version (e.g. Spring Cloud 2025.1.x supports Boot 4.0.x; 2025.1.2 / commons 5.0.2 added 4.1.x), and Spring Framework is governed by the Boot BOM. Bumping them in separate PRs yields individually-unmergeable PRs — a Boot-only bump fails the runtime verifier, a Cloud-only bump fails to compile. One group bumps them together so they pass/fail as a unit (see CLAUDE.md backlog #4).
Group BouncyCastle dependencies (bcpkix/bcutil/bcprov pinned together to address transitive CVEs from io.kubernetes:client-java; keep all three on the same version)

Group the mongo image bump across the k8s manifest (kubernetes manager) and the Testcontainers + docs regex managers into one PR so the version stays consistent everywhere. Constrained to the 8.0 LTS line (EOL 2029-10-31) via allowedVersions: Renovate lands 8.0.x security patches but never jumps to a short-lived rapid-release line (8.1/8.2/8.3/8.4). See CLAUDE.md upgrade backlog #5.

Lock kubectl (.mise.toml) to the cluster node's minor line (kindest/node v1.35.5 -> kubectl 1.35.x) for an exact apiserver match. The e2e job's paths-filter excludes .mise.toml, so a kubectl-only bump never runs e2e and CI cannot catch kubectl<->cluster skew drift — this constraint is the guard. Bump it together with the kind CLI + kindest/node when the cluster moves to a new minor.

Do not automerge the CVE-override pins (BouncyCastle) — these sit in <dependencyManagement> as a deliberate CVE-fix floor and must be reviewed by hand and removed once the Spring Boot BOM catches up (see CLAUDE.md upgrade backlog). jackson-core override removed once the Boot 4.1.0 BOM reached 3.1.4 (>= the GHSA-2m67-wjpj-xhg9 fix floor); tomcat-embed-core override removed once the Boot 4.1.0 BOM reached 11.0.22 (CVE-2026-34483/34486/34487 fix floor).
